title: Work graph (machine-checkable extract)
description: JSON sidecar for GRAPH.md and the AUTHORITATIVE DAG. Units + dependency edges + wave ordering + the enumerated tag vocabulary V_tag. Edge {from,to} means 'to consumes from'. The validator treats this graph.json as authoritative (fail-closed): if GRAPH.md exists it MUST be present, and cycles are detected on the union of `edges` and edges derived from each unit's `deps`. V_tag = the `v_tag` registry; every unit tag (and every brief tag) MUST be a member (enforced by validate_run.py, since JSON Schema cannot constrain one property's items to another data-provided array).

v_tag.description: The enumerated tag vocabulary V_tag for this run. Functions as the enum for every unit/brief `tags` value; membership is enforced mechanically by validate_run.py.

tags.description: This unit's tags, each a member of v_tag (V_tag). Basis for tag-scoped learnings propagation.

revision.description: OPTIONAL (Bounded Graph Amendments). The graph revision number: 1 at Phase-4 approval (T6), incremented by exactly 1 per applied amendment record. Absent => revision 1 (no amendments). Cross-checked by validate_run.py I18: revision == 1 + |amendment records|.

amendments_applied.description: OPTIONAL (Bounded Graph Amendments). The amendment ids (A<NN>) applied to this graph, in order. I18 requires it to list exactly the amendments/A<NN>.json record ids in order.

retired_units.description: OPTIONAL (Bounded Graph Amendments). Units retired by a split_unit/cancel_unit amendment: {id, replaced_by[], amendment}. A retired id never reappears in units[] and (I17) never carries a debrief/verify.

socratic.description: OPTIONAL. The planner/architect's canonical 4-key socratic block (result of the FORK.COUNTER.ADMIT.PIVOT.RESIDUAL self-interrogation over the decomposition's load-bearing claim), same shape as debrief/verify. When present, validate_run.py's I13 check requires `counter` to record an OUTCOME (rejects blank/'n/a'). This is the schema-enforced landing place for the planner's socratic residue (D-07): the planner produces no debrief.json, so the block lives here.
